title: shuteria vestita var. densiflora
intro: Shuteria vestita var. densiflora, also known as the shrub Shutertia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Shutertia vestita var. densiflora are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
